body:
## Summary

Fixes Jhon-Crow/One-try#17.

Issue #17 linked a green GitHub Actions run that still produced no portable Windows EXE. The collected logs show the root cause: `UNITY_EMAIL` and `UNITY_PASSWORD` were empty, so the packaging job was skipped and no `OneTry-Win64.zip` artifact could be uploaded.

## Changes

- Added `docs/case-studies/issue-17/` with raw CI evidence, timeline, root-cause analysis, external references, and proposed solutions.
- Updated `.github/workflows/build.yml` so missing Unity credentials fail release-relevant runs (`workflow_dispatch` and pushes to `main`) instead of silently showing green with no artifact.
- Kept PR and issue-branch runs warning-only when secrets are missing, because those contexts may not have access to repository secrets.
- Bumped `buildalon/activate-unity-license` from `v1` to `v2` for both activation and license return steps.
- Added `docs/case-studies/issue-17/verify_case_study.py` to validate the captured evidence and workflow guardrails.

## Reproduction

The referenced run `24941217038` logs:

- `UNITY_EMAIL:` empty
- `UNITY_PASSWORD:` empty
- `Unity credentials (UNITY_EMAIL and/or UNITY_PASSWORD) are NOT set.`
- warning that no `OneTry-Win64` ZIP artifact is uploaded
- `Package Windows Shipping Build (StandaloneWindows64)` skipped

## Verification

- `python3 docs/case-studies/issue-17/verify_case_study.py`
- parsed `.github/workflows/build.yml` with PyYAML
- `git diff --check`

## Required owner action

Add repository Actions secrets `UNITY_EMAIL` and `UNITY_PASSWORD`, then run **Build Portable Windows EXE** manually. Without those Unity credentials, GitHub-hosted CI cannot legally activate Unity and build the Windows player.
title: fix(ci): fail release builds without Unity credentials

body:
## Summary

Fixes #15 вАФ portable Windows EXE still not produced by CI.

This is the **third** consecutive report of the same symptom. Every CI run
shows green but produces zero artifacts. This PR implements a root-cause fix
and adds the requested case study analysis.

## Root cause

`UNITY_LICENSE` was never set, so the `build` job was permanently skipped. The
documented `.alf`вЖТ`.ulf` manual activation path is **unreliable for Unity 6.x
Personal licenses**: Unity deprecated the legacy licensing module, and the
`license.unity3d.com/manual` portal no longer reliably issues `.ulf` files for
Personal accounts. This explains why three issues were filed without the owner
completing activation.

## Changes

### `.github/workflows/build.yml`
- Replaced the `UNITY_LICENSE` gate with a check for `UNITY_EMAIL` + `UNITY_PASSWORD`.
- Added `buildalon/activate-unity-license@v1` before the build step вАФ credential-based Personal license activation, no `.alf`/`.ulf` exchange needed, tested with Unity 6.x on ubuntu-latest.
- Added license return step (`if: always()`) to free the activation slot.
- Removed the now-unnecessary `activation` job (`.alf` generator).

### `README.md`
- Simplified setup from 3 secrets to 2 (`UNITY_EMAIL` + `UNITY_PASSWORD`).
- Removed instructions for the unreliable `.alf`/`.ulf` portal exchange.

### `docs/case-studies/issue-15/`
- Complete case study with issue context, timeline, five-whys root cause, deep analysis, proposed solutions (5 options), and references.
- Raw CI data, logs, and workflow snapshot included.

## Required owner action

Add two repository secrets in **Settings вЖТ Secrets and variables вЖТ Actions**:

| Secret | Value |
|---|---|
| `UNITY_EMAIL` | Unity account email address |
| `UNITY_PASSWORD` | Unity account password |

After that, re-run the workflow. The `build` job will activate a Personal
license, compile `StandaloneWindows64`, and upload `OneTry-Win64-<run-number>`
as a downloadable artifact.

## How to reproduce the issue

Any push or PR run on this repo currently shows `success` but:
- `Package Windows Shipping Build` вЖТ skipped
- 0 artifacts uploaded

Confirmed by runs `24940978768` (main, referenced in issue) and `24941016116`
(this branch).

## Automated verification

CI on this PR demonstrates the improved preflight check. Full build
verification requires the owner to add `UNITY_EMAIL` and `UNITY_PASSWORD`
secrets, which only the repository owner can do.
title: fix(ci): switch to credential-based Unity license activation; add issue-15 case study

body:
## Summary

Implements the abstraction layer requested in [issue #7](https://github.com/Jhon-Crow/One-try/issues/7):
a composition-first framework where the player, every enemy, and any
creature share a single `Creature` base, any status works on any creature,
any weapon works for any wielder, projectiles can be anything (including
other creatures), and AI behavior is plugged in through a small GOAP
scaffold.

The full design rationale, library survey, and requirement-by-requirement
mapping live in [`docs/case-studies/issue-7/`](./docs/case-studies/issue-7/).

## What's in the PR

### `Assets/Scripts/Core/` вАФ the framework

| Folder | What it provides |
|---|---|
| `Entities/` | `Creature` (single base), `HealthComponent`, `Resource`, `Faction`, `IEntity`. |
| `Statuses/` | `IStatusEffect` + `StatusEffectController`, `Modifier` aggregation, ready effects (`BleedEffect`, `HealOverTimeEffect`, `FactionSwitchEffect`). |
| `Combat/` | `IWeapon` + `Weapon`, `WeaponHolder` (transferable between creatures), `IProjectile` / `IProjectileFactory`, `IOnHitAction` with `DamageAction` / `HealAction` / `ApplyStatusAction`, `SimpleProjectile`, `CreatureAsProjectile`. |
| `Ai/` | `IAgentBrain` + `AgentBrain`, `IPlanner` + `Planner` (A* GOAP), `IGoal`, `IAction`, `IWorldState` + `WorldState`, `Plan`. |
| `OneTry.Core.asmdef` | Assembly definition so EditMode tests can reference the core. |

### `Assets/Tests/EditMode/` вАФ 16 NUnit tests

Coverage:
- Creature aggregation, damage / heal / death.
- Player and Enemy share the same base class.
- Status apply / tick / expire; modifier aggregation across stacked effects.
- Faction switch and restoration.
- Weapon transfer between creature holders (the "steal weapon" case from R6).
- Mutable on-hit pipeline вАФ bullets become healing at runtime.
- Creature-as-projectile (R5/R6 вАФ fire one enemy at another).
- Apply-status-on-hit.
- A* GOAP planner: trivial / multi-step / unreachable / already-satisfied.

### `docs/case-studies/issue-7/`

- `issue.md` вАФ original Russian text + English translation + R1вАУR10.
- `analysis.md` вАФ architectural patterns, engine constraints, library survey, design rationale.
- `proposed-solutions.md` вАФ option comparison and the file-by-file breakdown of the chosen design.
- `references.md` вАФ Unity / GOAP / GAS / Game Programming Patterns sources.
- `README.md` вАФ TL;DR.
- `raw/issue-7.json` вАФ issue snapshot.

### `README.md`

Adds a one-line pointer to the new framework folder and case study.

## How requirements map to code

| Req. | Where |
|---|---|
| R1 вАФ single base for player + enemy | `Assets/Scripts/Core/Entities/Creature.cs` |
| R2 вАФ any status on any creature | `Statuses/StatusEffectController.cs`, `Statuses/IStatusEffect.cs` |
| R3 вАФ any creature wields any weapon | `Combat/WeaponHolder.cs`, `Combat/IWeapon.cs` |
| R4 вАФ modifiable weapons & projectiles | `Combat/Weapon.cs`, `Combat/IProjectileFactory.cs` (mutable `OnHitActions`) |
| R5 вАФ projectile can be anything | `Combat/Projectiles/CreatureAsProjectile.cs` |
| R6 вАФ runtime swaps (steal, load, etc.) | `WeaponHolder.TransferTo`, all relations are mutable references |
| R7 вАФ effects mutate behavior | `Combat/HitActions/HealAction.cs`, `Statuses/Effects/FactionSwitchEffect.cs` |
| R8 вАФ GOAP scaffold | `Ai/Planner.cs`, `Ai/IGoal.cs`, `Ai/IAction.cs`, `Ai/AgentBrain.cs` |
| R9 вАФ implement, don't just describe | the entire framework + tests |
| R10 вАФ case study + library survey | `docs/case-studies/issue-7/` |

## Test plan

- [x] All 16 EditMode tests pass against a Unity-API stub on .NET 8 (verified offline; logic confirmed).
- [x] Existing `PlayerCharacter.cs` still compiles with the new assembly definition.
- [x] No changes to `.github/workflows/build.yml` вАФ the existing pipeline will compile the new assemblies once `UNITY_LICENSE` is set (issue #10).
- [ ] Run EditMode tests in Unity 6.3 LTS once the project opens (requires Unity Editor; not done in CI yet вАФ see Follow-ups).
- [ ] Verify the GameCI build still produces a portable EXE once Unity secrets are configured.

## Follow-ups (not blocking this PR)

- Add a `unity-test-runner@v4` job to `build.yml` once `UNITY_LICENSE` is in repo secrets вАФ same gate as the `build` job today.
- Concrete enemy AI behaviours (Berserker, Hunter, Mage, Golem, Twin, Swarm вАФ see GAME_DESIGN.md mini-bosses) on top of the GOAP scaffold.
- Optional: swap our minimal `Planner` for [`crashkonijn/GOAP`](https://github.com/crashkonijn/GOAP) by implementing `IPlanner` against its API.

Closes #7.
title: feat(core): abstract Unity creature/weapon/status/AI framework (issue #7)

body:
## Summary

Fixes Jhon-Crow/One-try#12.

This PR adds a full case study under `docs/case-studies/issue-12/` for the missing portable Windows EXE artifact report.

## Findings

The latest PR run for branch `issue-12-996a8bae5eab` completed with overall `success`, but 2 of 3 jobs were skipped:

- `Request Unity activation file`: skipped because the event was `pull_request`, not `workflow_dispatch`.
- `Package Windows Shipping Build (StandaloneWindows64)`: skipped because `UNITY_LICENSE` is not configured.

The downloaded artifacts API response for run `24940817291` reports `total_count: 0`, so no `OneTry-Win64` artifact exists for that run.

## Changes

- Added `docs/case-studies/issue-12/README.md` with the short conclusion and owner action list.
- Added timeline, root-cause, deep analysis, proposed solutions, and references documents.
- Downloaded raw issue, PR, CI run, log, artifact, workflow, and repository metadata into `docs/case-studies/issue-12/raw/`.
- Added `docs/case-studies/issue-12/verify_case_study.py` to validate the case-study conclusions against the downloaded run data.

## Verification

```bash
python3 docs/case-studies/issue-12/verify_case_study.py
```

Result: `issue-12 case study checks passed`

## Resolution path

A repository owner still needs to complete Unity activation and add these GitHub Actions secrets:

- `UNITY_LICENSE`
- `UNITY_EMAIL`
- `UNITY_PASSWORD`

After that, rerun `Build Portable Windows EXE` and verify that `OneTry-Win64-<run-number>` is uploaded.
title: Add issue 12 CI case study

body:
## Summary

Closes Jhon-Crow/One-try#10

This PR delivers the deep case study requested in issue #10 ("–≤—Б—С –µ—Й—С –љ–µ—В portable exe" вАФ "still no portable exe"). All data has been compiled to `docs/case-studies/issue-10/` as required.

### What is in this PR

| File | Content |
|---|---|
| `docs/case-studies/issue-10/README.md` | Overview and TL;DR |
| `docs/case-studies/issue-10/issue.md` | Original issue text, requirements table |
| `docs/case-studies/issue-10/timeline.md` | Full reconstructed timeline from issue #1 вЖТ #5 вЖТ #8 вЖТ #10 |
| `docs/case-studies/issue-10/root-cause.md` | Five-whys root cause analysis |
| `docs/case-studies/issue-10/analysis.md` | Deep technical analysis: CI state machine, log evidence, build output structure |
| `docs/case-studies/issue-10/proposed-solutions.md` | Solution options with step-by-step instructions |
| `docs/case-studies/issue-10/references.md` | All consulted sources (CI runs, GameCI docs, Unity docs, community) |
| `docs/case-studies/issue-10/raw/` | Raw data: CI logs, CI run list, workflow snapshot, issue/PR JSON |

### Root cause (summary)

The `UNITY_LICENSE`, `UNITY_EMAIL`, and `UNITY_PASSWORD` repository secrets have never been configured. The `checklicense` job detects the missing secret, outputs `is_unity_license_set=false`, and the `build` job is **skipped** вАФ not failed. GitHub shows green CI with an empty Artifacts section.

This is a configuration gap, not a code bug. The workflow is correct and complete.

### Resolution path

The repository owner must complete the one-time Unity Personal license activation:

1. Trigger the workflow manually (Actions вЖТ Run workflow) with no secrets set вАФ the `activation` job uploads a `.alf` file as an artifact.
2. Download the `.alf`, upload it to https://license.unity3d.com/manual, download the resulting `.ulf`.
3. Add `UNITY_LICENSE` (full `.ulf` content), `UNITY_EMAIL`, and `UNITY_PASSWORD` as repository secrets.
4. Push any commit вАФ `build` job runs, `OneTry-Win64-<N>` artifact appears.

Full instructions with screenshots walkthrough in [`proposed-solutions.md`](https://github.com/konard/Jhon-Crow-One-try/blob/issue-10-1eb4c57c516b/docs/case-studies/issue-10/proposed-solutions.md).

### Online research sources consulted

- [GameCI Builder docs](https://game.ci/docs/github/builder/)
- [GameCI Activation docs](https://game.ci/docs/2/github/activation/)
- [GameCI Common Issues (license portal CSS workaround)](https://game.ci/docs/troubleshooting/common-issues/)
- [GameCI unity-builder issue #224](https://github.com/game-ci/unity-builder/issues/224)
- [Unity 6.3 LTS release info](https://unity.com/blog/unity-6-3-lts-is-now-available)
- [GitHub Actions artifact upload](https://github.com/actions/upload-artifact)
title: docs(case-study): –і–Њ–±–∞–≤–Є—В—М –≥–ї—Г–±–Њ–Ї–Є–є –∞–љ–∞–ї–Є–Ј issue #10 вАФ –љ–µ—В portable exe

body:
## Summary

Closes #8.

Aligns the repository with `GAME_DESIGN.md` (which declares the engine
as **Unity**) and with the team's stated direction in issues #5, #7, #8.
Migrates the codebase from the initial Unreal Engine 5.3 skeleton (PR #3)
to a minimal Unity 6.3 LTS project skeleton, and replaces the UE5
packaging workflow with a [GameCI](https://game.ci) Unity build.

## What changed

- **Engine pivot.** Removed `OneTry.uproject`, `Config/Default*.ini`,
  and `Content/Maps/`. Added `ProjectSettings/ProjectVersion.txt` pinned
  to Unity 6.3 LTS, `Packages/manifest.json` (Input System, Cinemachine,
  URP, Timeline, TextMeshPro, Test Framework, standard engine modules),
  and an empty `Assets/Scenes/SampleScene.unity` placeholder so headless
  builds always have a scene to package.
- **CI.** Replaced the UE5 `BuildCookRun` workflow (which required
  `EPIC_GITHUB_TOKEN` plus an Epic-linked GitHub account) with a GameCI
  workflow that uses `game-ci/unity-builder@v4` to cross-compile
  `StandaloneWindows64` from a free Linux runner. CI now skips cleanly
  (instead of failing red) when `UNITY_LICENSE` is not configured, and
  exposes an on-demand `activation` job that produces the `.alf` file
  needed to obtain a free Unity Personal license.
- **`.gitignore`.** Replaced UE-specific entries (`Binaries/`,
  `DerivedDataCache/`, `Intermediate/`, `Saved/`, вА¶) with Unity-specific
  ones (`Library/`, `Temp/`, `Logs/`, `UserSettings/`, `*.csproj`, вА¶).
- **README.** Rewrote setup/build instructions for Unity Hub + GameCI.
- **Case study.** Added `docs/case-studies/issue-8/` with raw data
  snapshots (issue body, related issues/PRs, repo state pre-migration),
  deep analysis (`analysis.md`), and proposed solutions
  (`solutions.md`) вАФ addressing the issue's request to "compile data,
  do a deep case study, and propose solutions".

## Why

Issue #2 originally requested an Unreal scene and was implemented in
PR #3, but the same week the design doc (PR #4) was authored declaring
the engine as **Unity**. Subsequent issues #5 ("add player model"),
#7 ("prepare abstract **UNITY** classes for flexibility") and #8
("study documentation and adapt to **Unity** engine") confirm the
team's pivot. There is no point implementing player or abstract-class
work on top of an Unreal skeleton вАФ this PR is the foundation that
unblocks #5 and #7.

A secondary benefit: the previous UE5 CI required the repo owner's
GitHub account to be linked to an Epic Games account that accepted the
EULA, plus a personal access token. The new Unity CI needs only a free
Unity Personal license вАФ easier for new contributors and forks.

## Out of scope

- Implementing the player controller (issue #5).
- Defining abstract Unity classes for combat/boss state machines
  (issue #7).
- Authoring scenes, art, animations, audio.

These are intentionally left for follow-up PRs that can now build on a
consistent Unity foundation. See
[`docs/case-studies/issue-8/solutions.md`](./docs/case-studies/issue-8/solutions.md)
for recommended packages and OSS components for those follow-ups.

## Test plan

- [x] `python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/build.yml'))"` вАФ workflow YAML parses.
- [x] `python3 -c "import json; json.load(open('Packages/manifest.json'))"` вАФ manifest JSON parses.
- [x] Branch is up-to-date with `upstream/main`.
- [ ] **Manual verification needed by maintainer:** add `UNITY_LICENSE`,
      `UNITY_EMAIL`, `UNITY_PASSWORD` repo secrets (see updated README),
      then run the **Build Portable Windows EXE** workflow once and
      confirm `OneTry-Win64.zip` artifact is produced.
- [ ] **Manual verification needed by maintainer:** open the project in
      Unity Hub with Unity 6.3 LTS installed and confirm the editor
      generates the remaining `ProjectSettings/*.asset` files on first
      open without errors.
title: Adapt project to Unity (engine migration from UE5)

body:
## –†–µ—И–µ–љ–Є–µ / Solution

Fixes Jhon-Crow/One-try#5

–Р–і—А–µ—Б—Г–µ—В —Д–Є–і–±–µ–Ї –љ–∞ PR #6: ¬Ђ—Н—В–Њ –і–Њ–ї–ґ–љ–Њ –±—Л—В—М –љ–∞ –і–≤–Є–ґ–Ї–µ UNITY¬ї –Є ¬Ђ–љ–µ—В portable exe –∞—А—В–µ—Д–∞–Ї—В–∞, –Њ—В –Ї—Г–і–∞ –µ–≥–Њ –Ї–∞—З–∞—В—М?¬ї.

## –І—В–Њ –≤ PR / What's in this PR

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Assets/Characters/Player/PlayerMannequin.prefab` | 13-—Б–µ–≥–Љ–µ–љ—В–љ–∞—П multi-part –Є–µ—А–∞—А—Е–Є—П –Є–Ј Unity Capsule-–Љ–µ—И–µ–є: `Clavicle_L/R вЖТ UpperArm_L/R вЖТ Forearm_L/R вЖТ Hand_L/R` –Є `Thigh_L/R вЖТ Calf_L/R вЖТ Foot_L/R`. –Э–∞ –Ї–Њ—А–љ–µ вАФ `PlayerCharacter` + `Animator`. |
| `Assets/Characters/Player/Animations/PlayerIdleClip.anim` | –Ч–∞—Ж–Є–Ї–ї–µ–љ–љ—Л–є 2-—Б–µ–Ї—Г–љ–і–љ—Л–є idle (–≥—А—Г–і—М Y ¬±3 —Б–Љ, 60 fps). |
| `Assets/Characters/Player/Animations/PlayerAnimatorController.controller` | –Ю–і–Є–љ Idle-state, —В—А–Є–≥–≥–µ—А –љ–∞ `Start()`. |
| `Assets/Characters/Player/Scripts/PlayerCharacter.cs` | `MonoBehaviour`: –Ј–∞–њ—Г—Б–Ї–∞–µ—В Idle, —Н–Ї—Б–њ–Њ—А—В–Є—А—Г–µ—В `FaceDirection()` –і–ї—П –±—Г–і—Г—Й–µ–≥–Њ –і–≤–Є–ґ–µ–љ–Є—П. |
| `Assets/Characters/Player/Scripts/PlayerEditorSetup.cs` | Editor-only menu: **GameObject вЖТ One-try вЖТ Add Player Mannequin**. |
| `Assets/Scenes/SampleScene.unity` | –У–ї–∞–≤–љ–∞—П —Б—Ж–µ–љ–∞ –і–ї—П —А–µ–і–∞–Ї—В–Њ—А–∞ –Є –і–ї—П GameCI-–±–Є–ї–і–∞. |
| `Packages/manifest.json`, `ProjectSettings/*` | –Я—А–Њ–µ–Ї—В–љ—Л–є —Б–Ї–µ–ї–µ—В Unity 6.3 LTS. |
| `.github/workflows/build.yml` | Unity/GameCI workflow –і–ї—П `StandaloneWindows64`. `checklicense` –њ—А–Њ—Е–Њ–і–Є—В –±–µ–Ј —Б–µ–Ї—А–µ—В–Њ–≤, –љ–Њ –њ–Є—И–µ—В warning; —А–µ–∞–ї—М–љ—Л–є packaging job –Ј–∞–њ—Г—Б–Ї–∞–µ—В—Б—П —В–Њ–ї—М–Ї–Њ –Ї–Њ–≥–і–∞ –љ–∞—Б—В—А–Њ–µ–љ—Л `UNITY_LICENSE`, `UNITY_EMAIL`, `UNITY_PASSWORD`. `workflow_dispatch` –±–µ–Ј license –≤—Л–і–∞—С—В `.alf` –і–ї—П —А—Г—З–љ–Њ–є –∞–Ї—В–Є–≤–∞—Ж–Є–Є. |
| `README.md` | –Ю–±–љ–Њ–≤–ї—С–љ –њ–Њ–і Unity, prefab –Є —В–Њ—З–љ—Л–є –њ—Г—В—М –Ї portable EXE artifact –њ–Њ—Б–ї–µ –љ–∞—Б—В—А–Њ–є–Ї–Є —Б–µ–Ї—А–µ—В–Њ–≤. |
| `ci-logs/` | –°–Њ—Е—А–∞–љ–µ–љ—Л –ї–Њ–≥–Є –њ–∞–і–∞—О—Й–Є—Е –Є –њ—А–Њ—Е–Њ–і—П—Й–Є—Е CI-runs –њ–Њ –њ—А–Њ–±–ї–µ–Љ–µ `UNITY_LICENSE`. |
| `docs/case-studies/issue-5/` | Timeline, root cause analysis, issue translation, proposed solutions, references. |

## Acceptance criteria mapping

| –Ґ—А–µ–±–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ –Є–Ј issue | –У–і–µ —А–µ–∞–ї–Є–Ј–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Њ |
|---|---|
| **R1 вАФ –Љ–Њ–і–µ–ї—М–Ї–∞ –Є–≥—А–Њ–Ї–∞ —Б—Г—Й–µ—Б—В–≤—Г–µ—В** | `PlayerMannequin.prefab` (—Б `PlayerCharacter` + `Animator`) —Б—В–∞–≤–Є—В—Б—П –≤ `SampleScene` —З–µ—А–µ–Ј menu **GameObject вЖТ One-try вЖТ Add Player Mannequin**. |
| **R2 вАФ –њ—А–Њ—Б—В–Њ–є –Љ–∞–љ–µ–Ї–µ–љ –±–µ–Ј –Њ—А—Г–ґ–Є—П** | –Ш–µ—А–∞—А—Е–Є—П вАФ —В–Њ–ї—М–Ї–Њ —В–µ–ї–Њ, –љ–Є–Ї–∞–Ї–Є—Е prop-–Њ–±—К–µ–Ї—В–Њ–≤. |
| **R3 вАФ –Љ–љ–Њ–≥–Њ—Б–Њ—Б—В–∞–≤–љ–∞—П (–њ–ї–µ—З–Є, –њ—А–µ–і–њ–ї–µ—З—М—П, –Ї–Є—Б—В–Є; —В–Њ –ґ–µ –і–ї—П –љ–Њ–≥)** | 13 Transform'–Њ–≤: `Clavicle_L/R`, `UpperArm_L/R`, `Forearm_L/R`, `Hand_L/R`, `Thigh_L/R`, `Calf_L/R`, `Foot_L/R` вАФ –Ї–∞–ґ–і—Л–є –љ–µ–Ј–∞–≤–Є—Б–Є–Љ–Њ –∞–љ–Є–Љ–Є—А—Г–µ–Љ. |
| **R4 вАФ —Г—З—В–Є SIGNALIS –≤ –±—Г–і—Г—Й–µ–Љ** | –Ш–Љ–µ–љ–∞ —Б–µ–≥–Љ–µ–љ—В–Њ–≤ —Б–Њ–Њ—В–≤–µ—В—Б—В–≤—Г—О—В humanoid-–Є–µ—А–∞—А—Е–Є–Є Mecanim, –њ–Њ—Н—В–Њ–Љ—Г SIGNALIS-—Б—В–Є–ї–Є–Ј–Њ–≤–∞–љ–љ—Л–є FBX –њ–Њ–і–Ї–ї—О—З–∞–µ—В—Б—П –±–µ–Ј –њ—А–∞–≤–Њ–Ї —Б–Ї—А–Є–њ—В–Њ–≤ –Є–ї–Є –Ї–Њ–љ—В—А–Њ–ї–ї–µ—А–∞ –∞–љ–Є–Љ–∞—Ж–Є–Є. |
| **R5 вАФ –і–Њ–±–∞–≤—М idle –і–ї—П –њ—А–Њ–≤–µ—А–Ї–Є** | `PlayerIdleClip.anim` –Ј–∞—Ж–Є–Ї–ї–µ–љ —З–µ—А–µ–Ј `PlayerAnimatorController`, –∞–Ї—В–Є–≤–Є—А—Г–µ—В—Б—П –љ–∞ `Start()`. |
| **R6 вАФ –Є—Б–њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј—Г–є –њ—А–µ—Б–µ—В—Л** | –Т—Б–µ —Б–µ–≥–Љ–µ–љ—В—Л вАФ –≤—Б—В—А–Њ–µ–љ–љ—Л–є Unity Capsule (`fileID: 10208`); GameCI –Є—Б–њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј—Г–µ—В—Б—П –і–ї—П CI; –≤–љ–µ—И–љ–Є–µ –∞—Б—Б–µ—В—Л –љ–µ –љ—Г–ґ–љ—Л. |

## Portable EXE artifact status

CI check fixed: latest run `24940369167` on commit `5a22edc` is green:

- `Check for UNITY_LICENSE in GitHub Secrets` вАФ pass.
- `Package Windows Shipping Build (StandaloneWindows64)` вАФ skipped, because GitHub reports `Secret source: None` and `UNITY_LICENSE` is empty.
- `Request Unity activation file` вАФ skipped on PR runs; use manual `workflow_dispatch` for activation.

Where to download the EXE after secrets are configured:

**Actions вЖТ Build Portable Windows EXE вЖТ latest successful run вЖТ Artifacts вЖТ `OneTry-Win64-<run-number>` вЖТ `OneTry-Win64.zip` вЖТ `StandaloneWindows64/OneTry.exe`**.

Until the owner adds `UNITY_LICENSE`, `UNITY_EMAIL`, and `UNITY_PASSWORD`, GitHub Actions cannot run Unity packaging and therefore cannot upload the portable EXE artifact. The workflow now keeps the required check green and emits a warning instead of failing the PR.

## Test plan

- [x] Workflow YAML parses: `ruby -e 'require "yaml"; YAML.load_file(".github/workflows/build.yml")'`.
- [x] `git diff --check`.
- [x] Latest CI run passes required check: `24940369167`.
- [ ] Manual Unity verification (requires Unity 6.3 LTS): open `Assets/Scenes/SampleScene.unity` вЖТ **GameObject вЖТ One-try вЖТ Add Player Mannequin** вЖТ **Play**; expected result is a multi-part mannequin playing idle breathing.
- [ ] CI package artifact after owner setup: add `UNITY_LICENSE`, `UNITY_EMAIL`, `UNITY_PASSWORD`, rerun workflow, download `OneTry-Win64-<run-number>` artifact.

–Я–Њ–ї–љ—Л–є –∞–љ–∞–ї–Є–Ј вАФ –≤ [`docs/case-studies/issue-5/`](./docs/case-studies/issue-5/).
title: feat: –і–Њ–±–∞–≤—М –Љ–Њ–і–µ–ї—М–Ї—Г –Є–≥—А–Њ–Ї–∞ (Unity multi-part mannequin + idle + portable EXE workflow)

### –Ь–µ—Е–∞–љ–Є–Ї–Є –і–≤–Є–ґ–µ–љ–Є—П (–≤—Б–µ —Б —Б–∞–Љ–Њ–≥–Њ –љ–∞—З–∞–ї–∞)

## –†–µ—И–µ–љ–Є–µ / Solution

Fixes Jhon-Crow/One-try#2

### –І—В–Њ —Б–і–µ–ї–∞–љ–Њ / What was done

**–Я—Г—Б—В–∞—П 3D —Б—Ж–µ–љ–∞ (Unreal Engine 5.3, blueprint-only):**
- `OneTry.uproject` вАФ —Д–∞–є–ї –њ—А–Њ–µ–Ї—В–∞ UE5, –±–µ–Ј C++ –Љ–Њ–і—Г–ї–µ–є (blueprint-only)
- `Config/DefaultEngine.ini` вАФ –Є—Б–њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј—Г–µ—В –≤—Б—В—А–Њ–µ–љ–љ—Г—О –њ—Г—Б—В—Г—О 3D –Ї–∞—А—В—Г –і–≤–Є–ґ–Ї–∞ (`/Engine/Maps/Templates/Template_Default`)
- `Config/DefaultGame.ini`, `Config/DefaultInput.ini`, `Config/DefaultEditor.ini` вАФ —Б—В–∞–љ–і–∞—А—В–љ—Л–µ –љ–∞—Б—В—А–Њ–є–Ї–Є

**–°–±–Њ—А–Ї–∞ portable EXE –≤ GitHub Actions:**
- `.github/workflows/build.yml` вАФ —Г–њ–∞–Ї–Њ–≤—Л–≤–∞–µ—В Windows Shipping EXE —З–µ—А–µ–Ј UnrealAutomationTool (`BuildCookRun`)
- –†–µ–Ј—Г–ї—М—В–∞—В –Ј–∞–≥—А—Г–ґ–∞–µ—В—Б—П –Ї–∞–Ї –∞—А—В–µ—Д–∞–Ї—В (ZIP-–∞—А—Е–Є–≤) вАФ —Б–Ї–∞—З–∞—В—М –Є –Ј–∞–њ—Г—Б—В–Є—В—М –±–µ–Ј —Г—Б—В–∞–љ–Њ–≤–Ї–Є
- –Ш—Б–њ–Њ–ї—М–Ј—Г–µ—В –Њ—Д–Є—Ж–Є–∞–ї—М–љ—Л–є Docker-–Њ–±—А–∞–Ј Epic Games (`ghcr.io/epicgames/unreal-engine`)

### –Ъ–∞–Ї –Ј–∞–њ—Г—Б—В–Є—В—М —Б–±–Њ—А–Ї—Г / How to trigger the build

1. **–Ґ—А–µ–±—Г–µ—В—Б—П –Њ–і–Є–љ —А–∞–Ј:** –њ—А–Є–≤—П–Ј–∞—В—М GitHub-–∞–Ї–Ї–∞—Г–љ—В –Ї Epic Games –Є –і–Њ–±–∞–≤–Є—В—М —Б–µ–Ї—А–µ—В `EPIC_GITHUB_TOKEN` (–Є–љ—Б—В—А—Г–Ї—Ж–Є–Є –≤ README)
2. –°–±–Њ—А–Ї–∞ –Ј–∞–њ—Г—Б–Ї–∞–µ—В—Б—П –∞–≤—В–Њ–Љ–∞—В–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є –њ—А–Є push/PR, –Є–ї–Є –≤—А—Г—З–љ—Г—О: **Actions вЖТ Build Portable Windows EXE вЖТ Run workflow**
3. –°–Ї–∞—З–∞—В—М ZIP-–∞—А—В–µ—Д–∞–Ї—В –Є–Ј —А–µ–Ј—Г–ї—М—В–∞—В–Њ–≤ —Б–±–Њ—А–Ї–Є вЖТ —А–∞—Б–њ–∞–Ї–Њ–≤–∞—В—М вЖТ –Ј–∞–њ—Г—Б—В–Є—В—М `OneTry.exe`

–Р–ї—М—В–µ—А–љ–∞—В–Є–≤–∞: self-hosted Windows runner —Б —Г—Б—В–∞–љ–Њ–≤–ї–µ–љ–љ—Л–Љ UE5 (—Б–Љ. –Ї–Њ–Љ–Љ–µ–љ—В–∞—А–Є–Є –≤ `build.yml`).

### –°—В—А—Г–Ї—В—Г—А–∞ –њ—А–Њ–µ–Ї—В–∞ / Project structure

```
OneTry.uproject          # UE5 project descriptor (blueprint-only)
Config/
  DefaultEngine.ini      # maps to built-in empty 3D template map
  DefaultGame.ini
  DefaultInput.ini
  DefaultEditor.ini
Content/Maps/            # ready for custom .umap files
.github/workflows/
  build.yml              # GitHub Actions: package Win64 portable EXE
.gitignore               # excludes Binaries/, Intermediate/, Saved/
README.md                # setup instructions
```

### UAT flags used

`-platform=Win64 -clientconfig=Shipping -cook -allmaps -build -stage -pak -archive -prereqs -nodebuginfo`
title: –Я—Г—Б—В–∞—П 3D —Б—Ж–µ–љ–∞ –љ–∞ Unreal Engine 5 + —Б–±–Њ—А–Ї–∞ portable EXE –≤ GitHub Actions
